full_text:
Zhang Meng (Shuwei) 張猛 (叔威)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Meng (張猛), styledShuwei (叔威), was born in Dunhuang. Mother told he would die in a certain tower. Killed fellow officer Handan Shang, murdered by avenging troops. Zhang Meng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhang Meng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
